scripts.dev: concurrently -n "server,client" -c "magenta,cyan" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w client && npm install -w server && npm install -w shared
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
